text: Hey! Do you have the High-Alpine Parka in stock in Navy?
expected_reply: Hi! Yes, the High-Alpine Parka is currently in stock in Navy. You can find it here: https://fjordapparel.com/products/high-alpine-parka-navy

text: My order #88219 arrived damaged. The zipper is completely broken.
expected_reply: I'm so sorry to hear about the damaged zipper! I've escalated this to our support team, and a human agent will reach out to you here shortly to arrange a replacement.

text: I'm 6'2" and 210lbs, should I get an L or XL in the base layers?
expected_reply: Great question! For your height and weight, we usually recommend an XL for a comfortable fit in our Merino Base Layers. Check out our detailed size guide here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/size-chart

text: Just wanted to say I love my new boots! Took them up Mt. Rainier this weekend.
expected_reply: That's incredible! Mt. Rainier is no joke. We're so glad the boots kept you moving. Tag us in your photos—we'd love to see them in action!

text: I need to change the shipping address for my order #99201. It's for a $650 bulk order for my guide team.
expected_reply: I've flagged this for our priority support team since it involves a large order update. Someone will assist you with that address change within the hour.

text: Is the Trail-Runner shell waterproof or just water-resistant?
expected_reply: The Trail-Runner shell is fully waterproof with a 20k/20k rating! It's designed for heavy downpours. Details here: https://fjordapparel.com/products/trail-runner-shell

text: I've been waiting 3 weeks for my package and no one is responding to my emails.
expected_reply: I sincerely apologize for the delay and the communication gap. I am escalating this to our customer success manager immediately to track down your package.

text: What's the difference between the 'Arctic' and 'Glacier' insulation levels?
expected_reply: The 'Arctic' line is built for sub-zero static activities, while 'Glacier' is optimized for high-output movement in cold weather. You can compare our insulation tech here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/insulation-guide

text: Do you offer pro-deals for search and rescue volunteers?
expected_reply: We certainly do! Thank you for what you do. You can apply for our Pro Program here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/pro-application

text: I want to buy 10 pairs of the Summit Socks for a gift, do you have a discount code?
expected_reply: That's a lot of cozy feet! You can use code SUMMIT10 for 10% off orders of 5 items or more. Shop socks here: https://fjordapparel.com/collections/socks

text: The color of the jacket I received looks nothing like the photo on the website. I'm very disappointed.
expected_reply: I'm sorry the color wasn't what you expected. I've sent this to our team to help you with a return or exchange for a color you'll love.

text: When are you restocking the 4-Season Tent?
expected_reply: We're expecting a restock of the 4-Season Tent in mid-October! You can sign up for notifications on the product page here: https://fjordapparel.com/products/4-season-tent

text: Can I return a gift if I don't have the receipt?
expected_reply: We can usually help with gift exchanges for store credit! Check out our gift return portal here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/returns

text: Is the wool ethically sourced?
expected_reply: Sustainability is at our core. 100% of our wool is RWS (Responsible Wool Standard) certified. Read about our sourcing here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/sustainability

text: I ordered the Expedition Kit ($599) and it says delivered but it's not here.
expected_reply: I'm sorry to hear your high-value order is missing. I've escalated this to our shipping specialists to open a claim with the carrier and get this resolved for you.

text: Do the pants have a gusseted crotch for climbing?
expected_reply: Yes! Our Alpine Tech Pants feature a full gusset and articulated knees for maximum mobility. Check them out: https://fjordapparel.com/products/alpine-tech-pants

text: Your website is crashing every time I try to checkout.
expected_reply: Oh no! I'm sorry for the technical trouble. I'm alerting our tech team and a support agent will message you to help process your order manually.

text: What are your holiday shipping deadlines for the East Coast?
expected_reply: To get your gear by 12/24, please order by 12/16 for Standard shipping or 12/20 for Express. Full details here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/shipping

text: Do you ship to Norway?
expected_reply: Yes, we ship to Norway! International shipping rates and times are calculated at checkout. More info: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/international

text: I'm an influencer and want to collab. Who do I talk to?
expected_reply: We love connecting with the community! Please fill out our creator form here and our marketing team will take a look: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/collabs

text: The XL fits like a Medium. This is ridiculous.
expected_reply: I'm sorry the sizing was so far off! That doesn't sound right. I'm escalating this to our quality team to see if there's a labeling error and to help you with a return.

text: How do I wash the Down Sleeping Bag?
expected_reply: Proper care is key! We recommend a front-loading washer with down-specific detergent and tumble drying on low with tennis balls. Guide: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/care-instructions

text: I'm placing a $1,200 order for my wedding party. Can I get a bulk discount?
expected_reply: How exciting! For an order of that size, I've looped in our VIP coordinator to provide you with custom pricing and support.

text: Are the zippers YKK?
expected_reply: Yes, we use YKK Vislon or AquaGuard zippers on all our technical outerwear for maximum durability. Specs here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/materials

text: I hate the new logo. The old one was way better.
expected_reply: Thanks for sharing your feedback! We're always evolving, but we appreciate hearing from our long-time fans. I'll pass your thoughts along to our design team.

text: Is the Daypack big enough for a 16" laptop?
expected_reply: Yes! The Daypack features a padded sleeve that fits most 16" laptops comfortably. Check dimensions: https://fjordapparel.com/products/daypack

text: My package was stolen from my porch. What can you do?
expected_reply: I'm so sorry to hear that happened. I've escalated this to our support team to help you file a claim and see how we can help you get your gear.

text: Do you have a physical store in Denver?
expected_reply: We don't have a standalone Fjord store in Denver yet, but you can find us at REI and other local outfitters! Store locator: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/stockists

text: I need to return this jacket but I lost the bag it came in.
expected_reply: No worries! You can return items in any secure packaging as long as the tags are still attached. Start your return here: https://fjordapparel.com/pages/returns

text: The seams on my leggings are unravelling after just one hike.
expected_reply: That certainly shouldn't happen with our gear. I'm escalating this to our quality control team so we can replace those for you immediately.
